mapper.select:
SELECT notiId, fkMemberId, title, message, linkUrl, isRead FROM ( SELECT NOTI_ID AS notiId, FK_MEMBERID AS fkMemberId, TITLE AS title, MESSAGE AS message, LINK_URL AS linkUrl, IS_READ AS isRead FROM TBL_NOTIFICATION WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{fkMemberId} AND IS_READ = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NOTI_ID AS notiId, FK_MEMBERID AS fkMemberId, TITLE AS title, MESSAGE AS message, LINK_URL AS linkUrl, IS_READ AS isRead FROM TBL_NOTIFICATION WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{fkMemberId} AND IS_READ = 1 ORDER BY NOTI_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 ) ORDER BY isRead ASC, notiId DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOTIFICATION WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{fkMemberId} AND IS_READ = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_NOTIFICATION SET IS_READ = 1, READ_AT = SYSDATE WHERE NOTI_ID = #{notiId}
